attributes.description: Port of the Grafana 'Proxmox via Prometheus' dashboard (14 panels). Reads from metrics-prometheus.collector-* via the prometheus-pve-exporter federation scrape (PR #281). Heavy PromQL joins simplified to flat label-based breakdowns; bargauge collapsed to lnsMetric per Stream L convention.
